/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/iris_lua_demo.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/iris_lua_demo.dir/test/iris_lua_demo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/iris_lua_demo.dir/src/lua/src/lapi.c.o CMakeFiles/iris_lua_demo.dir/src/lua/src/lauxlib.c.o CMakeFiles/iris_lua_demo.dir/src/lua/src/lbaselib.c.o CMakeFiles/iris_lua_demo.dir/src/lua/src/lcode.c.o CMakeFiles/iris_lua_demo.dir/src/lua/src/lcorolib.c.o CMakeFiles/iris_lua_demo.dir/src/lua/src/lctype.c.o CMakeFiles/iris_lua_demo.dir/src/lua/src/ldblib.c.o CMakeFiles/iris_lua_demo.dir/src/lua/src/ldebug.c.o CMakeFiles/iris_lua_demo.dir/src/lua/src/ldo.c.o CMakeFiles/iris_lua_demo.dir/src/lua/src/ldump.c.o CMakeFiles/iris_lua_demo.dir/src/lua/src/lfunc.c.o CMakeFiles/iris_lua_demo.dir/src/lua/src/lgc.c.o CMakeFiles/iris_lua_demo.dir/src/lua/src/linit.c.o CMakeFiles/iris_lua_demo.dir/src/lua/src/liolib.c.o CMakeFiles/iris_lua_demo.dir/src/lua/src/llex.c.o CMakeFiles/iris_lua_demo.dir/src/lua/src/lmathlib.c.o CMakeFiles/iris_lua_demo.dir/src/lua/src/lmem.c.o CMakeFiles/iris_lua_demo.dir/src/lua/src/loadlib.c.o CMakeFiles/iris_lua_demo.dir/src/lua/src/lobject.c.o CMakeFiles/iris_lua_demo.dir/src/lua/src/lopcodes.c.o CMakeFiles/iris_lua_demo.dir/src/lua/src/loslib.c.o CMakeFiles/iris_lua_demo.dir/src/lua/src/lparser.c.o CMakeFiles/iris_lua_demo.dir/src/lua/src/lstate.c.o CMakeFiles/iris_lua_demo.dir/src/lua/src/lstring.c.o CMakeFiles/iris_lua_demo.dir/src/lua/src/lstrlib.c.o CMakeFiles/iris_lua_demo.dir/src/lua/src/ltable.c.o CMakeFiles/iris_lua_demo.dir/src/lua/src/ltablib.c.o CMakeFiles/iris_lua_demo.dir/src/lua/src/ltm.c.o CMakeFiles/iris_lua_demo.dir/src/lua/src/lundump.c.o CMakeFiles/iris_lua_demo.dir/src/lua/src/lutf8lib.c.o CMakeFiles/iris_lua_demo.dir/src/lua/src/lvm.c.o CMakeFiles/iris_lua_demo.dir/src/lua/src/lzio.c.o -o iris_lua_demo  -lm -lstdc++
